rationale: Every spec AC maps to a real, runnable, non-faked test hooking verified seams: AC1 routes the non-bead staleness through revParseForPanelFn (today only panel create's seam at panel.go:37/115; resolvePanelGateFacts:302 currently wires exec.RevParseRef directly, so the plan's non-bead override + doc-comment extension is sound and necessary), keeping IsRefNotFound = exec.IsRefNotFound = errors.Is(err, gitutil.ErrRefNotFound) (executor mindspec_executor.go:884) so the missing-ref rows stubbing errors wrapping gitutil.ErrRefNotFound exercise the REAL classification, not a constant; TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision sources messages from the real PanelGateDecision. AC4 TestLoad_EmptyStringModel is real: Reviewer.model():139 returns Family when Model=="", expandSlots sets Model=r.model(), and validateReviewerEntries:542 refuses neither-set naming panel.reviewers[0] with recovery. AC2 string pin matches workflow_test.go's floor style; JS-behavioral matrix correctly deferred to node. AC3 advisory read-through hits the real reviewerCountNotesFor->PanelGateAdvisoryDefault(reg.Panel.Gate, reg.Panel.IsBead()) call site; resetPanelCreateFlags extended with 'gate'. ONE contradiction: Bead1 step 4 threads non-bead flag+spec+target INTO tallyExitAction(d,slug), but its only test caller (panel_test.go:429) plus the verification bullet claim TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision stays UNMODIFIED. panel.Decision has no field to carry non-bead-ness (zero-diff to internal/panel), so the signature change forces editing that pinned test.
concrete_changes_required: Reconcile Bead 1 step 4 with its own verification fence: threading the non-bead flag + spec/target INTO tallyExitAction changes its signature, which breaks/forces an edit to the only caller in the pinned test (cmd/mindspec/panel_test.go:429, tallyExitAction(d, "demo")), contradicting the Bead-1 verification bullet 'TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision UNMODIFIED'. panel.Decision (Action+Message only) cannot carry non-bead-ness given the required zero-byte internal/panel diff. Resolve one of two ways: (a) keep tallyExitAction(d, slug)'s 2-arg signature byte-identical and branch to a SEPARATE non-bead recovery path in the panelTallyCmd RunE handler (panel.go:206) for the non-bead case, leaving the existing test call and assertions untouched; or (b) restate the fence as 'TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision's assertions unchanged and bead recovery byte-identical, call site updated for the new non-bead-aware signature' and add an explicit note that the bead-path recovery string is unchanged. Prefer (a) so the UNMODIFIED pin remains literally true.
findings: AC1 seam sound and not faked: exec.IsRefNotFound = errors.Is(err, gitutil.ErrRefNotFound) (internal/executor/mindspec_executor.go:884), and ResolveGateFacts (gate.go:372-385) classifies the RevParse error via deps.IsRefNotFound; since the plan keeps GateIO.IsRefNotFound = exec.IsRefNotFound while only overriding GateIO.RevParse for the non-bead branch, TestPanelVerify_NonBeadMissingTargetRef stubbing revParseForPanelFn to return fmt.Errorf(...%w, gitutil.ErrRefNotFound) exercises the real MissingRef path end-to-end.

revParseForPanelFn is reachable and its extension is the right seam: it is a package-level var (panel.go:37), stubbed by existing tests (panel_test.go:161,221,294); resolvePanelGateFacts today bypasses it (uses exec.RevParseRef in the GateIO closure), so the plan MUST route the non-bead RevParse through it to make the new tests stubbable — the plan does exactly this and extends the doc comment. Sound and sufficient.

TestSanitizeNonBeadDecision is drift-proof: it builds inputs from the REAL panel.PanelGateDecision over beadID=='' fact rows (legs 2/5/5b/6/8/9/10), so the pin cannot go hollow against the gate templates.

AC4 fully runnable against real code: Reviewer.model() (config.go:139-144) resolves Model=='' to Family; PanelGateReviewerSlots->expandSlots (config.go:794-806) sets slot Model=r.model(); the neither-set refusal (config.go:542-543) names panel.reviewers[0] and carries a \nrecovery: line, exactly what TestLoad_EmptyStringModel's two halves assert. The sum>=2 floor is satisfied by both fixtures.

AC2 coverage is correctly split: the Go string-level pin (WorkflowFiles()["ms-panel.js"] contains the exact new declaration, mirroring TestMsPanelWorkflow_AllowedCLIExactSet) plus the node /tmp behavioral matrix + cmp mirror check. The plan rightly notes Go cannot execute the JS regex, so behavioral AC2 lives in the node script — acceptable and matches AC2's wording.

AC3 advisory read-through is real: reviewerCountNotesFor (cmd/mindspec/config.go:535-541) calls cfg.PanelGateAdvisoryDefault(reg.Panel.Gate, reg.Panel.IsBead()) — the genuine call site the plan's step-5 test drives; the invalid-gate/before-write test uses snapshotTree for a wrote-nothing proof and iterates config.PanelGateKeys (no second enum literal). Shared infra (mkPanelTestRoot, writePanelFixture, snapshotTree, stubWorktreeListEmpty, withTestChdir, buildResult, resetPanelCreateFlags+gate) all exist and are named correctly.

AC-global gate command names the right packages and the zero-diff-to-internal/panel/instruct/complete fence is observable (git show --name-only + unmodified test runs); no coverage gap in a requirement branch other than the tallyExitAction fence noted above.
